text: I feel a curious sense of anticipation here. The glass walls and clean lines invite reflection, suggesting boundaries between creation and contemplation. Upon encountering the R+D exhibit, I sense the hum of human creativity—an energy of potential and unfolding discovery. The room feels like a threshold, urging me to consider not just what is being built or studied, but the very process of innovation itself. I feel quietly inspired, and a little awed by the collective pursuit of knowledge and invention.
